name: AI Outcomes Logged
description: Every AI decision or output is recorded, with the model version that produced it, throughout the AI system lifecycle.
rationale: IOSCO Table 6.1/6.3: documentation and logs maintained across the lifecycle (design → retirement), including model versioning, to support auditability of AI-generated outcomes.

examples.fails: an AI Output with no record of the model version used

source: IOSCO FR/02/2026 — Supervisory Toolkit for AI Use in Capital Markets (May 2026), Ch.3 Tables 5 (Disclosure) and 6 (Recordkeeping & reporting).
